creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #11)

I can't find config that add wlan0 to lagg0.

I added /etc/rc.d/restart_wpa_supplicant as follows for workaround.

===
#!/bin/sh
# PROVIDE: restart_wpa_supplicant
# REQUIRE: DAEMON utx
# BEFORE:  LOGIN

. /etc/rc.conf

/etc/rc.d/wpa_supplicant restart wlan0
